reviews.title: Ear piece hook
reviews.text: Comfort is relative to the design itself and not necessarily due to product. Durability is also related to how you handle placing the ear piece on. It’s very stiff and allows very little flexibility so subject to snap in pieces. As for the value it’s right on the money. Especially since I was unable to find a replacement locally (Romania). Despite the additional cost of shipping it was still better than buying a new Jabara headset. Also it arrived earlier than expected which was greatly appreciated.

title: Skullcandy Jib True Wireless Earbud with Microphone / 22 Hour Battery Life / Use with iPhone and Android / Best for Gym, and Gaming / Bluetooth Earbud Headphones - Black/Orange
description: Experience total freedom on a budget with Jib True. The newest true wireless earbud from Skullcandy is easy to connect and easy to enjoy. Call, track change, and volume controls are all within close reach through one main button. 22 hours of audio on a single charge means you spend less time recharging and more time enjoying your music. Jib True earbuds are adventure-ready, too. An IPX4 rating means Jib True is sweat- and dust-resistant. You don’t need to worry about damage if a little rain kicks up during your urban or outdoor adventure. Dual microphones make your calls more clear and if you feel like keeping one ear open, you can use either bud ‘solo’ without missing a beat.
features: Supreme Sound - Powered by 6mm drivers the Jib features dynamic audio with gnarly bass and a wide sound range. The earbuds also feature bluetooth 5.0 for a strong signal making sure you can listen to your music or take phone calls interruption free.

22 Hours of Play - With a 55mAh battery in the earbud and 500 mAh in the charging case you'll get a whopping 22 hours of charge total, 6 in the earbuds and 16 in the case. Use the included charging case for on the go charging as well as safe storage for your earbuds.

Dual Microphones - keeping you sounding extra clear while on calls or talking to your best friend Siri. Dual mics also means you can have 1 ear open and 1 earbud in while on calls to keep aware of your surroundings.

Small, Medium, Large Ears - Included in the Jib is 3 different eargel tips to make sure you have comfy noise isolating fit. The earbuds are super lightweight and water/dust resistant perfect for the active person!
Buy With Confidence - 1 year manufacturer's warranty included with the Jib, be sure to wear your earbuds with full confidence.

reviews.title: Tis Loud! Has great bass & long lasting battery!

Alot of headphones lack good bass and sometimes cuts out, but not this set, these earbuds have great bass without over doing it.

Not a bad price to boot, and they're Skullcandy, nough said

reviews.title: Was expecting more from these
reviews.text: I love Skull Candy. But honestly I was expecting more and a better sound. They actually hurt my ears so they were a no go for me. Gave them to a niece.

reviews.title: I love Skullcandy Products!

reviews.title: Amazing for the price... Great range, sound good.
reviews.text:
Battery latest me my whole work day.

Sound is good enough, bluetooth range is impressive, better then my Samsung buds.

Easy setup.

So far, very happy. Some people say I sound like im in an empy room, but some times it doesnt happen?

I dont know if its true noise canceling, but the buds are tight enough you dont get outside noise.

title: [2 Pack] Airtag Keychain for Apple Air Tag Holder IPX8 Waterproof 360 Full Body Shockproof Protective Cover Case Scratch Resistant for Pets, Dog, Keys, Cat, Luggage-Black
features: 【Compatibility】Exclusively designed airtag holder for newly released Apple Airtag 2021 (Note: Airtag is not included).

【IPX8 Water Tolerance】This airtag keychain holder takes advantage of IPX8 waterproof: no water leakage or penetration or damage even 6m(20ft) deep underwater. It becomes durable to sweat, rain, wash, and daily laundry, making it washable when it is stained with dust or dirt.

【Shockproof & Full-body Protection】Made from the hybrid material of PC and TPU, makes your Airtag invulnerable. Equip this as armor to the air tag keychain to prevent scratches, drops, shocks, and damage from every corner.

【Portable & Stylish Looking】This airtag case, simple but protective, adds more eye-catching help you find your belongings, like bags, luggage, and keys. Easy to install and dispart. You can attach it to whatever belongings you like.

【One-step Installation& Use Occasion】Four steps is quite enough to cover your Airtag with such an extraordinary case.Attachable to car key, backpack, schoolbag, dog leash, and other belongings you want to track. Easily attach your airtag to the things you want to keep track of.

reviews.title: Pros and Cons
reviews.text: Pros:  I really like these holders.  I would give it a 5 star if they were all alike.  two are as demoed in the video and two are totally different.  Cons:  The two white/clear holders are totally different from the blamk and pink.  The clear back just snaps on, and does not completely close and lock with the circle ring.  If it snaps apart, you could loose the airtag!!!  I decided to keep them because I do like the pink and black.  I put the other two in my car in case it was stolen.  The other two I can put on my key ring.  Very nice holder, just wish all four were like the pink and black.  It does NOT show this in the demo video.

reviews.title: When used worked well
reviews.text: I didn't use these long but feel like they would work great.

reviews.title: Decent

reviews.title: Exact type of ear buds I need.

Volume, sound and use of buttons are all fantastic.

reviews.title: Just What I Wanted
reviews.text: I wanted to replace my old clunker of a boom box.  I needed a small CD player with_ a speaker so I wouldn't have to wear ear buds.  That's what I found here. At first, I wondered about the sound, but considering how small it is, the sound is fine.  I'm glad to have easier access to my CD collection.

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth CD player
reviews.text:
I have a few CDs that I have kept despite mostly using streaming services. Music not available online. This device allows me to hear them again.
Connected very easy to my Bluetooth tailgate speaker.

Don't plan on using the built in speaker as I have several better speakers that I can connect to with cable or Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Sound Quality not the best on its own speakers
reviews.text:
I found using the Aux cable along with my Bluetooth headphones the sound quality is much better.
The headphones that came with unit wasn't that good.

reviews.title: Very Good Portable CD Player With Plenty of Options
reviews.text:
With the onset of Pandora, satellite radio and many other such options, I found I wasn’t playing my CDs anymore. In fact, I couldn’t find my CD player! And the high-end system in my truck doesn’t even have a CD option. So when I saw this I figured I give it a try. I like that it’s portable and plays without skipping even when bumped, running with it, or the dog knocking it off of the table. It can be used with my several different sets of earphones. It also plugs into my truck stereo without a problem.

I also wanted it to play through its own speaker while in my crafts room. This is where the 5th star gets removed. When turning it up nearly all the way the speaker starts to buzz on certain notes. It isn’t loud at all on its own either so using it without auxiliary speakers is not good if more than about 8 feet from it. However, I am playing my CDs which I have not heard in years, and that makes me very happy.

reviews.title: Fun and good
reviews.text:
My 13 yo son is on the vintage wave, so he has been using this and the cassette one. He is happy!
Very portable, small size.
The sound is ok.
Has been using it non stop and still working good.
Would be a fun gift for someone who likes old school (on a fun way, not like a collector)
We like it.

reviews.title: OK Headphones
reviews.text: I think these headphones are more like 3.5 stars but I rounded up.  I have kind of a small head for an adult female, and still these headphones were too tight.  Usually I can wear headphones made for kids but not these.  These are definitely for smaller heads and small ears since the ear cups get painful after a while since they aren't big enough to fully cover my ears.  The sound is o.k., nothing to write home about, but for the price (as of this review these head phones cost $19.44) I think they are worth it.  Great for kids, not so good for adults, even if you are a pinhead.

reviews.title: High quality headphones
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 4th grade child to use at school. It is hard to find headphones with plug-ins and that aren't wireless. For my son, the ones with a plug are best to use his school issued ipad. These are sturdy and I'm hoping they last the entire school year.

reviews.title: Not really for large heads.
reviews.text: All the talk about "classroom" and "child's" in the Amazon listing really means "this is a small headset." It's not big enough for me. I have a large (7 3/4) head and this thing actually hurts my ears (presses on them too hard). If you need headphones for a child then this would work just fine. Not for me.

reviews.title: Good headphones for kids
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 6 yr old. They fit her great and don’t get so loud that they can damage her ears.

reviews.title: saved my husband’s life!
reviews.text: ...because it covered the sound of his snoring and I no longer am tempted to smother him with a pillow! They are very comfortable even though I’m very sensitive to irritable feelings. I’m a light sleeper and it blocked out all the little lights that keep me awake. It stayed charged all night. I’m ordering another for day time use! I’ll probably give  them to every one I know for Christmas. Seriously amazing!

reviews.title: Adequate sound quality but difficult controls.
reviews.text: I use the sleep headphones because I listen to books to get to sleep. I need the volume quite high because I use hearing aids. This headset is adequate for my purpose. It’s very comfortable to wear, but the controls are not very sensitive.

reviews.title: Works well for sleeping
reviews.text:
I wanted some headphones that were flat and wouldn't hurt my ears or fall out and get lost while I was trying to go to sleep. These work just fine. The speakers lie flatly against my head and don't poke or feel lumpy. I only use them for sleeping, though, not for exercising, so I can't say how easy or difficult it would be to remove the speakers and controller to wash the headband part.

Sound is fine. They don't go into your ear like regular earbuds, so you have to turn the volume up a little, but it does what it should. I haven't tried to control the volume using the buttons on the headband so I can't really rate that aspect. All in all, it does what I wanted it to.

reviews.title: Not comfortable
reviews.text: This thing works well, but it’s not comfortable for laying down. I was hoping to wear it at night while falling asleep but there is no way to get comfortable with it on due to the small speakers inside. I’m not sure how it would work with exercise either because it’s pretty loose and I’d be worried to get sweat on it.

reviews.title: Headband, controls, sound quality, charge stats--all exactly what I wanted
reviews.text:
This resolved so many issues with other options. The headband is so very comfortable--wish I could buy 5 headbands without speakers just for the comfort for everyday wear. What I really wanted was comfortable speakers for podcasts as I go to sleep or do tasks or just enjoy! These fit the bill. Volume is perfect. Bluetooth connection is quick and stable. I can do 2 nights before charging again. The buttons work well with podcasts, moving to next or previous episodes. I just ordered a second one.

Thank you and if there is a way to get just the headband, please let me know.

reviews.title: Great for TV
reviews.text:
So far the KBEAR Larks are the best sounding dual driver in-ear I have used. I have used them for listing music, playing and singing live and even watching TV. In comparison, I have about 5 different pair of dual driver in ears. These are by far my favorite.

Live music:
I use more expensive 5-8 driver in ears for playing live. I will say these don’t stack up against the more expensive in-ears but if I had to choose from this price bracket then I would choose these.

Great for TV:
Recently I tried all my in-ears(12 pair) for listening to tv. My parents often do this as they are hard of hearing and they get a much better listening experience with headphones. Therefore, I thought I would find the most well rounded pair for doing just that. These won! I preferred them, even over headphones that cost twice as much.

Listening to music:
These got the job done. I wasn’t amazed but they didn’t leave a lot to be desired either.

EQ:
Slightly elevated lows and highs. To me they weren’t harsh. They lacked some clarity but nothing sounded intrusive to my ears which tends to happen with other brands.

Pros:
-Nice packaging
-Quality case
-Somewhat a jack of all trades. Do many things well.
-Look stylish
-Fit my ears well
-Comfortable especially with replacement memory foam tips

Cons:
-Silicone tips suck. Replace with memory foam.
-My other 2 pin cords didn’t fit these.

reviews.title: Good value and monitor sound is good for music and voices.
reviews.text: I use these IEMs while singing with my church's praise team. The sound quality is good and allows good distinction of sounds without distortion or static. Connecting the wire to each ear bud was easy in comparison the other brand I had. I've not had any issues with them disconnecting. I also like the copper cord since it is more inconspicuous with colored clothing. The length of the cord is long enough to run down the back of my shirt and into the pack on my waistband. I am satisfied with this product and would buy them again.

reviews.title: OK IEMs
reviews.text: Work OK but sound quality not as good as other in ear monitors that I own in the same price range.

reviews.title: Great sound for a cheap fun IEM! Fake sloppy bass lol
reviews.text: The KBEAR KS2 are actually pretty great sounding! I was really surprised for the price on these the sound is really Bassy and fun. The dynamic driver 10mm produces some intense bass and deep lows that sound stunning and the balanced armature mixes almost perfectly together. Vocals are pushed forward a bit and mids are also. Kind of hard to explain I haven’t listened that much yet but compared to my Jade Audio EA3 they aren’t as professional sounding it’s more of a enhanced sloppy bass and everything is pushed forward more. Still a fun IEM though I would definitely recommend them given you get some different ear tips and a cord if you have an extra (it’s not horrible).

reviews.title: Cheap headphones
reviews.text: No proper manual, no mention of noise-cancelling

The earphones are louder and have a certain noise reduction effect when used outside.

reviews.title: Amazing ear pad replacements for the Logitech G35 headset!
reviews.text:
- Makes my G35 headset look better than when I bought it new thanks to the red accent markings!
- The installation tool was extremely helpful, and thanks for including it.
- Just a bit of warning for others the kit that includes the head pad isn’t mean for the Logitech G35 headset, because it is a different size and it doesn’t have Velcro underneath the head pad. I just ordered the ear pads only, and ended up using the spare two fake leather head pads that came with my G35 headset.
- Other thoughts: Not sure what some people are complaining about, but my ear pads are comfortable and fit my headset well. I’m just going to assume some peoples ears are extremely sensitive than others to certain fabrics. I like the cloth mesh pads compared to the original leather pads for two reasons. The cloth won’t crack or peel off like the leather pads, and the cloth pads are more breathable for the ears (ears won’t get hot or humid).

reviews.title: They are comfortable, which is the main thing
reviews.text: I bought these for my G930 since the outside was flaking off of mine a lot. I have been using these for almost 5 months and I have had no issues out of them. They are comfortable, which is the main thing. And since it isn't the fake leather of the original, I dont have a problem with it causing my ears to sweat or stick to it. Installing them were simple as well.

reviews.title: Barely noticeable difference between these pads and the official Logitech pads
reviews.text: The only difference in these pads is that the mesh is slightly rougher than that of the ear pads that come with the Logitech G430 headphones. Otherwise, there is no noticeable difference.

reviews.title: great replacement for my G930
reviews.text: I bought these blue mesh ear pads to replace my original fake leather pads on my Logitech G930 headphones. These went on super easily, took no effort, and are a perfect fit. They also come with a little tool to help slide the pads on but i didn't even need it. I also like the mesh pads because my ears stay a bit cooler than on the original leather-ish ones. These are a great value for the price, and I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Good but scratchy.
reviews.text: They fit perfectly on my Logitech g35s but they are very scratchy.

reviews.title: Great feel
reviews.text: They’re great just not small enough for my ears.  Feels wonderful in the ear and wish they would have x-small which than likely be able to keep them in my ears.  Passed them off to my granddaughter and she loves them.  I have Sony buds, which were very expensive, but their ear pads are even larger and of course Sony would not help nor take the product back even though I only had the product for one day.  Quality is excellent.

reviews.title: Nice quality but definitely not large size.
reviews.text: Nice quality but definitely not large. They were supposed to be large size but they are about the size of the mediums that came with the earbuds.

reviews.title: Lets in the perfect amount of sound
reviews.text: Reliable, the perfect size holes and fit for the sound on my 50$ sony headphones.

reviews.title: Nice fit!
reviews.text: I kept losing my original buds for my beats flex earbuds i could not remember where i put the original extras that came with the package. I wear these every day and use yhe often so i was missing them big time. I ordered a different brand and they felt flimsy and i didnt like them so I figured i would give these a try next. First off they fit very tight onto the stem of the earbud. I dont think i am going to lose these. Second it comes with three sizes so it was easy for me to find the ones that fit the best. I intend to order more of the right size just on the off chance i lose one again which I doubt will happen.

reviews.title: Perfect replacement.
reviews.text: Comes with a variety of sizes. Fit snug on the headphones and are soft in my ears.
